tasks.subject: Task 1: Swap dark-mode palette values
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all 24 variable values in the `[data-theme="dark"]` block of `theme.css` with the approved slate/cool palette, leaving the light `:root` block untouched.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/assets/theme.css:36-62`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All 24 dark-block variables match approved values
- Light :root block (lines 6-33) unchanged
- No old purple/neon dark values remain

**Verify:** `grep -nE '0B0912|181426|4A9EFF|EDE8FD|FF6166|FF5E7A' frontend/src/assets/theme.css` → no output; `grep -nE '#11161D|#3FAFCB|#E8EDF4' frontend/src/assets/theme.css` → matches.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/assets/theme.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE '0B0912|181426|4A9EFF|EDE8FD|FF6166|FF5E7A' frontend/src/assets/theme.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 24 dark-block variables match approved values", "Light :root block unchanged", "No old purple/neon dark values remain"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
